# Transcrição: 8. Average Customers Spend 11 Hours Researcing Purposes Online

- **Fonte:** 8. Average Customers Spend 11 Hours Researcing Purposes Online
- **Duração:** 01:51
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:51]

Consider that the average consumer spends up to 11 hours on a major purchase online. That is, they're looking to buy something and they spend more time shopping online than they do with the salesperson or the company. Now look, whether you have people come to you because you have a showroom or you go to them and you're selling a really quick-cycled sale, maybe it's a refrigerator you're delivering and you're collecting the money. Or you're signing somebody up for gym courses, fitness, yoga, TRX classes, you're a personal life coach and you're out there. You want to be using a tablet right now. Why? Because that tablet speeds up the process. It takes them off of that little phone, puts them on to something bigger and you don't want to drag a computer around with you. Also, you want to use that 11 hours of research of TRX or the insurance you're selling or the mortgages they've done research. Ask them while they're there. You're in front of them, in their office, in their home. You're talking about a mortgage that's 30 years long. Pull out your tablet and ask them, hey, let me see your computer. I guarantee you, if they're having an appointment with you today about mortgages, they have at least two browsing screens open right now where they were shopping two other lenders about mortgages. Does that make sense? See what I'm doing? I'm not trying to give you information here. I'm trying to give you information so you can use it so that you know which of your technologies to use when you're in front of this person. To me, it doesn't matter what the price of the product is. It doesn't matter whether it's a tangible, intangible, whether I'm in their home or whether they're in my home. I'm going to treat them like a million dollars anyway and I've got to figure out what makes sense to them. What do they trust the most? Do they trust their computer the most? Do they trust the tablet the most? Do they trust the phone the most? I know this. They don't trust me the most. They trust that internet the most and I want to use it so they can trust me.
